phoneticUs: 瑟n藞t忙ljo蕣; 瑟n藞t蓱藧ljo蕣
meaning: n.鍑归洉,闃撮洉,鍑归洉鐜夌煶vt.鍑归洉
examples: It is an indirect intaglio printing process.
I, intaglio business card printing and membership card.
The picture shows the intaglio printing workshop of this company.
These cylindrical pieces of stone, some barely an inch in length, were incised with intaglio designs featuring gods and animals.
The front of each note will feature an image of Queen Elizabeth II, a hand engraved intaglio portrait based on a photograph by Mark Lawrence.
